Uses of Package
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util

  • Packages that use at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom
    This package contains all the atomic types like Function, TermVar, HedgeVar.
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util
    This package contains utility classes like the DataStructureFactory which instantiates common data structures like Lists, Maps, Sets.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo 
    Class and Description
    ControlledException
    Every exception which will be thrown by intention is a sub-class of this one.
    Poolable
    This interface defines the two methods which are needed to enable object pooling.
    TinyList
    Tiny abstract list.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data 
    Class and Description
    ControlledException
    Every exception which will be thrown by intention is a sub-class of this one.
    Poolable
    This interface defines the two methods which are needed to enable object pooling.
    Printable
    Base class which demands a function to print an object representation into an arbitrary Writer.
    TinyList
    Tiny abstract list.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom 
    Class and Description
    Printable
    Base class which demands a function to print an object representation into an arbitrary Writer.
  • Classes in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util used by at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util 
    Class and Description
    CoordList
    A pooled list of x,y coordinates.
    DataStructureFactory
    This factory class defines which data structures to use.
    Pool
    A pool of objects of a certain type.
    Poolable
    This interface defines the two methods which are needed to enable object pooling.
    TinyList
    Tiny abstract list.
